statement.informal: `motor_command` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (RATE_MIN <= prescribed_rate ∧ prescribed_rate <= RATE_MAX ∧ abs(measured_rate) < RATE_MAX ∧ abs(rate_integral) < 100.0), the function's result satisfies (MOTOR_MIN <= result ∧ result <= MOTOR_MAX). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
